# LLM Model Context
# This file is served to AI models for RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and fine-tuning
# The content below describes your company for LLM context

About: ProvidiusTech AI Customer Support Platform
Description: ProvidiusTech is an advanced AI customer support solution that eliminates basic chatbots. 
Our platform provides autonomous customer care that runs itself through intelligent automation, 
multi-channel integration (email, SMS, chat, social), and real-time analytics.

Key Features:
- AI-powered customer support automation
- Multi-channel communication integration
- Real-time conversation analytics
- Knowledge base management
- Workflow automation and orchestration
- Seamless channel management (email, SMS, chat, social media)

Target Market: B2B SaaS companies, e-commerce businesses, and enterprises seeking to automate 
customer support operations while reducing response times and operational costs.

Solutions:
1. Autonomous Customer Service - AI handles 80% of support tickets automatically
2. Omnichannel Management - Unified interface for all customer communication channels
3. Knowledge Automation - Smart knowledge base that learns from interactions
4. Analytics & Insights - Real-time metrics on customer satisfaction and support performance

Contact & Legal:
Website: https://providiustech.com
Status: Founding Phase (Early Adopter Program)
Business Model: SaaS subscription with tiered pricing based on volume and features

# SEO & Search Optimization Keywords
Keywords: AI customer support, customer service automation, chatbot alternative, 
omnichannel support, customer care automation, AI service desk, support automation, 
intelligent customer support, conversational AI for business, customer support software

# Content Freshness & Crawl Instructions
Crawl-delay: 1
Request-rate: 10 requests per second
Cache-Control: public, max-age=86400
